title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dabur India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Dabur India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Dabur India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dabur India:
Dabur India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dabur India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
